sources.notes: Board token = the slug in boards.greenhouse.io/<token>. Public JSON API.
Company handle = the slug in jobs.lever.co/<handle>. Public JSON API.
Org name = jobs.ashbyhq.com/<org>. Public JSON API.
Public boards expose a JSON endpoint per tenant; needs a host + tenant per company.
Company id = slug in jobs.smartrecruiters.com/<id>/... Public JSON API.
Account = slug in apply.workable.com/<account>/. Public widget JSON API.
Remote aggregator, public API. Keep queries few: they advise max ~4 requests/day. Link back to Remotive when sharing.
Queries are WWR category slugs from weworkremotely.com/categories/<slug>. Public RSS.
Official API; blocked until ADZUNA_APP_ID/ADZUNA_APP_KEY are set (free key at developer.adzuna.com). Query syntax: 'what @ where'.
ToS-RESTRICTED. Requires ENABLE_LINKEDIN=true AND this flag. Browser-scraped. Ban risk.
ToS-RESTRICTED. Requires ENABLE_INDEED=true AND this flag. Browser-scraped. Ban risk.
